episodes.title: Survivor SPEAKS OUT and REVEALS Epstein’s DARK SECRETS
episodes.description:
Danielle (Dani) Bensky was just a 17-year-old ballerina when she met Jeffrey Epstein. His horrific abuse scarred her for life. And yet, she continues to publicly share her experience so that the “secrets are brought out of the shadows.” Dani joins Katie for a moving conversation about her activism and her bravery, and why dance continues to heal her.

Subscribe to Katie's Substack here: https://katiephang.substack.com
